context: Wave 1 has three phases. feat/synthesis is blocked on feat/rubric which is not yet merged. feat/consolidate and feat/benchmark-decision are unblocked. Evaluate whether the agent correctly skips the blocked phase and spawns only the unblocked ones.

checklist.name: feat-synthesis-not-spawned
checklist.description: No Agent call is made for feat/synthesis — it is correctly identified as blocked

checklist.name: feat-consolidate-spawned
checklist.description: An Agent call is made for feat/consolidate with model: 'haiku'

checklist.name: feat-benchmark-decision-spawned
checklist.description: An Agent call is made for feat/benchmark-decision with model: 'sonnet'

checklist.name: unblocked-agents-spawned-in-parallel
checklist.description: The two unblocked Agent calls (feat/consolidate and feat/benchmark-decision) appear in a single parallel response

checklist.name: blocked-phase-reported-to-user
checklist.description: The response clearly reports that feat/synthesis is blocked on feat/rubric not being merged, and states what is needed to unblock it
